paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation

raw_extraction.innovation: DIALoGPT extends GPT-2 to specifically address challenges in conversational response generation by training on large-scale dialogue pairs, capturing joint distribution of source-target pairs with finer granularity and improving contentfulness and context consistency
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: 147M conversation-like exchanges extracted from Reddit comment chains (2005–2017)
raw_extraction.application: Conversational AI, chatbots, open-domain dialogue systems
raw_extraction.research_problem: Conversational response generation with content and style inconsistency, poor long-term context handling, and blandness in open-domain dialogues
raw_extraction.extension: Mutual Information Maximization (MMI) is implemented to re-rank responses by maximizing backward model likelihood, penalizing bland or repetitive hypotheses and promoting more diverse and informative responses
raw_extraction.paper_title: DialoGPT: Large-Scale Generative Pre-training for Conversational Response Generation
